caveat: Per-bin flux power P_F(k_par) for the saturation-aware intervention run vs truth (P1, eval n_rays=1024/seed=42). The mechanism table behind the failure signature: in the gate band the model preserves the SHAPE of P_F (log-space Pearson 0.8346) while rendering it at ~0.43x the true amplitude (band ratio mean 0.4293) -- amplitude-shrink with shape preservation, NOT a constant-prediction collapse, and NOT the flux->1 transparency collapse of the later interventions. Three window-null NaN bins dropped (k-axis matches the ep03 fig1-pf-miss.csv 17-bin axis; overlay the production baseline from that file -- do not re-ship it). Single realization / fixed cosmology (Sherwood, one 60 cMpc/h box); z=0.3 scope-lock.
internal_lineage: [D-40] Addendum 1 per-bin dump (scripts/diag_pf_per_bin.py); verdict string of record: REFUTED-strict-C: shape preserved (pearson>0.7) but amplitude suppressed; degeneracy is scale-distortion, not constant-collapse
